# Supply Chain Optimization {#sec-supply-chain}

::: {.callout-note appearance="simple"}
## Learning Objectives
- Formulate inventory optimization problems (EOQ, newsvendor, multi-period)
- Model the Vehicle Routing Problem (VRP) as integer programming
- Build a predict-then-optimize pipeline for stochastic demand
- Evaluate cost of ignoring uncertainty vs. stochastic solutions
:::

## Introduction

*Coming soon.*

## Summary

## Further Reading
